case_title: DAVID NAVARRO et al VS. STREET BROWN

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT BROWN, STREET
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF NAVARRO, DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, STREET

MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY STREET BROWN IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT TO PAY $20.00 PER MONTH, BEGINNING APRIL 15, 2008 AND ON THE 15TH DAY OF EVERY MONTH UNTIL THE JUDGMENT IS FULLY PAID. IF ANY PAYMENT IS MISSED, THE ENTIRE BALANCE BECOME DUE IMMEDIATELY.
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING SENT TO DAVID NAVARRO RETURNED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 625 LARKIN STREET OWNERS' ASSOCIATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BROWN, STREET $718.05 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $778.05, THE COURT FIND AGAINST PLAINTIFF NAVARRO AND IN FAVOR OF DEFENDANT WITH REGARD TO THE RENTAL OF PLAINTIFF'S PARKING SPACE AND RELEASES DEFENDANT FROM FURTHER OBLIGATIONS FOR FEBRUARY OR MARCH RENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY DEFENDANT BROWN, STREET HEARING SET FOR MAR-28-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-28-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-28-2008. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. BY OLLIE MARIE-VICTOIRE; CLERK;S. VANTREE; NOT REPORTED (506).
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-13-2007, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, STREET
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-28-2008 - JUDGMENT. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT. BOTH EXHIBITS RETAINED. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT; CLERK; S. VANTREE; NOT REPORTED (506)
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO DEFENDANT BROWN, STREET ADDITIONAL PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF NAVARRO, DAVID
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-28-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-28-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT.ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
